docket_entries.description: UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF JUN-05-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCE. (PETITION WAS STRIKENED BY DEPT. OF THE PJ)

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON APR-18-2012 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER ASRAT YEMANE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE WITH A DEFERRED PAYMENT THAT IS DUE BY 6/1/12. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERED THE HEARING FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR NAME CHANGE CONTINUED FROM 5/31/12 TO 6/5/12 AT 9:00AM IN DEPT. 514. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES FILED BY PETITIONER YEMANE, ASRAT HEARING SET FOR APR-18-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF MAY-31-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME CONTINUED TO JUN-05-2012 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 514 PER THE COURT'S RULING ON THE FEE WAIVER HEARING OF 4/18/12. (206)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER YEMANE, ASRAT HEARING SET FOR MAY-31-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 514
FEES NOT PAID. PETITION OF ASRAT YEMANE FILED ON 3/26/12 IS STRICKEN. THE HEARING ON 6/5/12 IN DEPT. 514 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)
